title: Flash Sprint
description: Use flash.nvim to jump to 10 targets as fast as possible
tasks: Flash-jump to 'searchQuery' in the filter callback
Flash-jump back to the import block
hints: Press s then type the first 1-2 characters of your target
Flash shows labels — press the label character to jump instantly
Each jump should take 3-4 keystrokes maximum

title: Surround Master
hints: Use saiw" to surround a word with quotes
Use sr'" to replace single quotes with double quotes
Use sd( to delete surrounding parentheses
Use saiw] to surround with brackets

title: Buffer Juggler
description: Manage multiple buffers and windows efficiently
tasks: Open Base.astro in the new split (<leader>ff)
hints: <leader>| creates a vertical split, <leader>- creates a horizontal split

title: The Week 2 Gauntlet
description: Combine leader keys, flash, explorer, surround, and window management in a timed workflow
tasks: Flash-jump to a prop name (s + chars)
Open a split and find Search.astro (<leader>| then <leader>ff)
hints: This challenge tests your ability to combine Week 2 skills fluidly
Don't rush — accuracy beats speed at this stage
